{{Quote|Captain Trent, I need your status.|Mace Windu contacts Trent|<ref name="SP" />}}
'''Trent''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="TCSWE" /> [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was in command of the<ref name="SP" /> [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]]<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> ''[[Halleck]]'' when it was assigned to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]<ref name="SP" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="TNEC" /> During a [[Battle of Haruun Kal/Legends|mission]] to extract Windu and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]], the ''Halleck'' was attacked by [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]], and the captain was injured. His subordinate, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Urhal]], was able to withdraw the ship to [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] space.<ref name="SP" />

==Behind the scenes==
Trent was first mentioned in [[Matthew Stover]]'s [[2003]] novel [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']].<ref name="SP" />
